name: ames-meta
description: Meta Business Suite MCP connector for Facebook Pages, Instagram, Threads, Ads Manager, Commerce, Conversions API, and related Graph API workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Connect Claude and Codex to Meta Business Suite.
interface.longDescription: A Meta Business Suite MCP connector for Facebook Pages, Instagram, Threads, Ads Manager, Commerce, Conversions API, audiences, insights, and utility workflows. Requires META_ACCESS_TOKEN; THREADS_ACCESS_TOKEN is optional for Threads-specific tools.
